delivery.title: Work delivery
delivery.notePlaceholder: Describe what you have completed and any important notes...
delivery.submitted: Delivery submitted. The client has been notified.
delivery.revisionReasonPlaceholder: Describe the changes needed in detail...
delivery.disputeReportPlaceholder: Explain in detail why you are disputing this delivery (min 20 characters)...
delivery.acceptedMsg: Delivery accepted. Payment has been released to the freelancer.
delivery.autoReleasedMsg: Payment was automatically released after the review period expired.
delivery.disputedMsg: Dispute opened. An admin will review the chat history, files, and both sides.
delivery.revisedMsg: Revision requested. The freelancer has been notified.
delivery.maxRevisionsWarning: Maximum revisions reached. You can only accept or open a dispute.

deliveryErrors.TASK_NOT_ACTIVE: This task is not active and cannot receive a delivery.
deliveryErrors.FILE_REQUIRED: Please attach at least one file.
deliveryErrors.OPEN_REVISION_EXISTS: Close the open revision before submitting a new delivery.
deliveryErrors.DELIVERY_ALREADY_RESOLVED: This delivery has already been resolved.
deliveryErrors.MAX_REVISIONS_REACHED: Maximum revisions reached. Only accept or dispute is allowed.
deliveryErrors.DISPUTE_ALREADY_EXISTS: A dispute is already open for this delivery.
deliveryErrors.PAYMENT_RELEASE_FAILED: Payment release failed. Please contact support.
deliveryErrors.PAYMENT_REFUND_FAILED: Payment refund failed. Please contact support.
deliveryErrors.DISPUTE_CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT: Another admin just resolved this dispute. Please refresh.
